modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Sent items from shared email account not saving correctly.

full_description_text: User is trying to send emails from a shared account. The sent emails are not showing up in the correct Sent Items folder. Instead, they seem to be going to a different location. This is causing confusion and issues with email tracking.
short_description: Sent items from shared email account not saving correctly.
description: User is trying to send emails from a shared account. The sent emails are not showing up in the correct Sent Items folder. Instead, they seem to be going to a different location. This is causing confusion and issues with email tracking.
